testimonials.title: Why people and businesses stay with FreeEarnHub

items.quote: I can move between micro tasks and nearby job applications without relearning the whole platform. The updates are clear, and I always know the next step.
items.name: Riya S.

items.quote: Posting local roles and tracking applicants from the same dashboard saves us a lot of back-and-forth. The hiring flow feels clear and organized.
items.name: Arjun K.

items.quote: The platform keeps digital work and local hiring separate, while the reporting still stays in one place. That makes day-to-day operations much easier.
items.name: Nadia R.

about.title: About FreeEarnHub
about.description: FreeEarnHub is a verified operations platform for digital work, local jobs, internships, and moderated delivery.

build.title: What We Build
build.body: Businesses launch testing, feedback, content, research, data tasks, and moderated local jobs. Users complete digital work or apply for verified roles, and every payout or hiring step is reviewed before it moves forward.

trust.title: How Trust Is Maintained
bullets: Human review before rewards are approved or job applications move forward
Clear wallet records for credits, debits, funding, and withdrawals
Fraud, privacy, and abuse checks before payouts or applicant release
Recorded decisions for support, disputes, moderation, and audit handling

direction.title: Our Product Direction
direction.body: FreeEarnHub is being shaped as a moderated operations and hiring marketplace, not a growth-hack exchange.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.description: Clear answers about accounts, rewards, withdrawals, campaigns, jobs, internships, and platform safety.

items.a: FreeEarnHub is a verified operations platform where businesses launch structured digital work and moderated local jobs, and users complete approved work or apply for verified roles.

items.q: Does FreeEarnHub support local jobs and internships?
items.a: Yes. Businesses can now run moderated local jobs and internship roles separately from digital work campaigns so hiring and task delivery stay controlled.

items.q: When do users receive rewards or hiring updates?
items.a: Task rewards are added after the submission is reviewed and approved. Job applications move through manager and admin review before the business can take hiring actions.

items.q: Do businesses need approval before campaigns or jobs go live?
items.a: Yes. Business accounts may require KYC approval, and campaigns or jobs can be held for admin review before they go live.

items.q: Do businesses see full applicant contact details immediately?
items.a: No. Job applications move through moderated review stages first, and sensitive applicant contact access is restricted during the early workflow.
Most withdrawal requests are processed within 3 to 5 business days, subject to fraud, reconciliation, and compliance checks.
We do not sell personal data. Data sharing is limited to essential service providers, necessary platform operations, and legal or regulatory obligations.

contact.title: Contact FreeEarnHub
contact.description: Need help with your account, payments, KYC, or campaigns? Contact the FreeEarnHub support team.
contact.supportResponse: Typical first response: 24 to 48 business hours.
contact.hoursNote: Critical payout or security incidents are prioritized.
contact.communityLead: Join our public channels for updates, launch news, and support notices.
contact.socialLead: Follow FreeEarnHub on social platforms for product updates and announcements.

help.title: Help
help.subtitle: Understand how tasks, job applications, profile readiness, levels, fraud checks, and withdrawals work before you take more work.
help.approvalStep1: 1. You submit proof from the task detail page.
help.approvalStep2: 2. Manager reviews first and can approve or reject.
help.approvalStep4: 4. Approved submissions credit your wallet automatically.
help.jobsBullet1: Jobs and internships use an application flow instead of proof submissions.
help.jobsBullet2: Your application goes to manager review first, then final admin review.
help.jobsBullet3: Only after verification can the business hire or reject. Interview scheduling is handled during admin review.
help.jobsBullet4: Your applications page shows each stage clearly so you always know what changed.
help.profileBullet1: Add city and state so nearby jobs can match correctly.
help.profileBullet2: Keep skills, languages, work mode, and internship preference updated.
help.profileBullet3: A stronger profile improves local job matching and admin recommendations.
help.profileBullet4: If you want physical jobs, optional coordinates help radius-based matching too.
help.levelsBullet1: Level upgrades are based on admin-approved submissions.
help.levelsBullet2: L1 starts immediately and higher levels unlock as approvals increase.
help.levelsBullet3: The daily activity counter resets on the configured reset schedule.
help.levelsBullet4: Your overview page shows current progress toward the next level.
help.fraudTitle: What can get a submission rejected
help.fraudBullet2: Submitting for a task without completing the required action.
help.fraudBullet3: Repeated abuse from the same device or IP.
help.fraudBullet4: Trying to bypass campaign slot or review controls.
help.withdrawalsBullet2: Emergency withdrawal is allowed below the minimum, up to 2 times per month.
help.withdrawalsBullet3: Only one pending withdrawal request is allowed at a time.
help.withdrawalsBullet4: Admin review determines approval or rejection.
help.supportBody: If something looks wrong in your submissions, job applications, wallet, or withdrawals, use the public contact page or the official support channel listed there.

pricing.usageNote: The funding and refund cards below follow the same pricing model shown here.

steps.title: Complete payment in 5 clear steps
steps.item1: Enter the amount you want to add.
steps.item2: Generate payment details to create a unique reference ID.
steps.item3: Pay using the QR code, UPI ID, or phone number and add the reference ID in the note.
steps.item4: Upload the payment screenshot and add UTR if available.
steps.item5: Click verify, then send the receipt on WhatsApp for faster review.

details.scanHelpBefore: Pay the exact amount and add
details.qrPending: QR code will appear after payment details are generated.
details.tip: Keep the screenshot clear and readable. If possible, write the reference ID in the note so our review team can approve it faster.

verification.description: After payment, upload the screenshot here. We review each request manually before the wallet is credited.

verification.uploadHelp: One screenshot only. JPG, PNG, or WEBP. Max 500 KB after compression.

placeholders.title: Enter task title

benefits.title: What this unlocks
benefits.body: Once connected, admin broadcasts and important workflow events can be delivered through in-app, email, SMS, push, and Telegram without changing your core moderation or payout logic.
